If WOMEN VOTE

pages.raw_text:
fragists say they are willing TO go
to war if they can vote, arey ou?"
the reporter asked.


mo, | am not. Women are peace
full members of society, and when
womans suffrage becomes univer-
sal it will eventually do away with
wars


This question came up when
Washington women were endeavor-
ing to have the legislature submit
an amendment to the constitution
to be voted on at the next general
election, and we found that nearly
one-third of the membres of the
house were exempt from soldier
duty.


Women are natural economists
and they would prefer that the
moneys wasted for ornaments and
munitions of war be used for feed.
ing, clothing and educating the chill
dren of the country. As women
have provided the soldiers of the
past and probably will continue to
do so in the future, not having had
the say what battles they should
fight, We propose to use the ballot
in the interests of peace"
